chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1491 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on CMA 6155/2022 2.For orders on CMA 6156/2022 3.For hearing of CMA 5901/2022 4.For hearing of main case 26-06-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-SALU, Khairpur. ***** Compliance report has been filed on behalf of Vice Chancellor, Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur (respondent No.2). We have been informed by learned counsel that the University has amicably found a solution to the problems being faced by the students of LL.B Part-II, 2017 before the cutoff date given by the Hon’ble Supreme Court. According to learned counsel for the respondents-university, the University has proposed that the exams of LL.B Part-II will be held as expeditiously as possible of those children who passed LL.B Part-I in the year 2017. We are pleased with this development and appreciate the efforts taken by the Vice Chancellor, SALU, Khairpur, as the education career of hundreds of students is/was at stake. We are optimistic that the University shall conduct exams within a period of two months. The Controller of Examinations (respondent No.3) is directed to ensure the same. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications; however, the respondent No.3 shall file his compliance report to this Court through its Additional Registrar. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
